chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1062 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 30.11.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Badal Gahothi, Advocate alongwith respondent No.5. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel = Today, SIP Imamuddin SHO P.S Hala is present in Court and submits that he has recovered the detenue Mst.Samina from her father’s residence. When Mst.Samina is asked about her will and wish, she has categorically stated that she wants to reside with her husband, who is respondent No.5 and is present in Court alongwith his Counsel Mr. Badal Gaothi. A report has also been filed by official respondent No.2 and according to which Mst. Samina has contracted a freewill marriage with present respondent No.5-Haji Muhammad and to this effect an affidavit of freewill and Nikahnama are also enclosed with the said report. At this juncture, the learned Counsel submits that earlier this report has been submitted by him (respondent No.5) in the petition filed by these persons. In view of the above, the present petition stands disposed of and the detenue Mst.Samina is set at liberty to accompany her husband, the respondent No.5. Learned Counsel further submits that family members of the detenue are present outside the Court and apprehend some illegal action on their part, therefore, today SHO Hala present in Court is directed to accompany respondent No.5 and detenue Mst.Samina to their choice of destination and the said SHO will ensure that no untoward incident should take place. JUDGE Shahid
